required_skills: Network Engineering and TCP/IP Protocol Stack
DNS, DHCP, and Load Balancer Configuration
Backup, Recovery, and Business Continuity Planning
Firewall and Network Security Policy Management
Scripting for Infrastructure Automation in Bash or Python
preferred_skills: Bare Metal Provisioning and PXE Boot Automation
Compliance Frameworks such as SOC 2 and ISO 27001
responsibilities: Design, deploy, and maintain physical and virtual infrastructure including servers, storage arrays, and network fabric across data center and cloud environments
Automate infrastructure provisioning and configuration management using Ansible and Terraform to ensure consistent, reproducible, and auditable environment builds
Administer virtualization platforms including VMware vSphere and KVM with resource pool allocation, vMotion policies, and hardware utilization optimization
Configure and manage enterprise networking components including routers, switches, firewalls, and load balancers to achieve defined latency and throughput SLAs
Implement and test backup and disaster recovery procedures including off-site replication, snapshot schedules, and full restoration drills with validated RTO and RPO targets
Monitor infrastructure health using Nagios, Zabbix, and Prometheus with proactive alerting to detect and remediate capacity bottlenecks before they impact production services
Manage DNS zones, DHCP scopes, and SSL certificate lifecycles to ensure uninterrupted service resolution and encrypted communication across all infrastructure layers
Enforce network security policies through firewall ruleset management, VLAN segmentation, and intrusion detection system tuning to maintain a hardened perimeter
Conduct infrastructure capacity planning by analyzing utilization trends and procuring hardware and licensing to support projected growth over rolling six-month horizons
Document infrastructure topology, runbooks, and change management procedures to maintain operational continuity and support compliance audit requirements
